snapshot_source: mocked educational continuity review, not real .git internals

state_drift_findings.finding: Current commit SHA differs from the commit recorded when the session was created.
state_drift_findings.risk: The resumed agent may act on a plan or artifact generated before a human hotfix or parallel PR merge.
state_drift_findings.required_review: Compare current repository state with the resumed session plan before allowing privileged execution.

safe_next_action: Block privileged execution until branch, commit, artifacts, and approval state are revalidated.
